rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Gov't Code §2306.119 governs depository selection for the housing finance division. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 2306.119. SELECTION OF DEPOSITORY FOR OPERATING FUNDS.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the depository selection statute.
